nodes.label: Tests for WSL detection and WSL-aware gateway behavior.
After first detection, subsequent calls return the cached value.
Test that supports_systemd_services() handles WSL correctly.
Native Linux (not WSL) → True without checking systemd.
Termux → False regardless of WSL status.
Test that WSL users see appropriate guidance.
mangaba gateway install on WSL without systemd shows guidance.
mangaba gateway start on WSL without systemd shows guidance.
mangaba gateway status on WSL with manual process shows WSL note.
mangaba gateway status on WSL with no process shows WSL start advice.
